issues.title: FunctionCallingOptions was not completely removed
issues.body:
Please do a quick search in GitHub issues first, you may already have a duplicate of the one you are about to create.
If the error is not serious, please create an issue directly. Otherwise, please take a few minutes to fill out the following sections:

**Bug Description**
Due to the changes in PR #2922, the FunctionCallingOptions implemented by MoonshotChatOptions has been removed!

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/74fe2e82-094d-416b-96b3-b6e1efa990bf)

**Environment**
Please provide as many details as possible: Spring AI version, Java version, vector storage you use (if any), etc.

**Steps to reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the problem.

**Expected Behavior**
Describe clearly and concisely what you expect to happen.

**Minimum Complete Reproducible Example**
Please provide a failing test or a minimal complete verifiable example that reproduces the issue.

Reproducible bug reports will be resolved before non-reproducible ones.

comments.body: Thanks for raising this issue! The Moonshot integration was moved to the Spring AI Community organization, so this issue should probably be transferred there: https://github.com/spring-ai-community/moonshot
Thank you for your timely response and reminder
